title: Track trump movements, trade like eric
author: xxqxpxx
selftext:
I'm a day trader and investor.
But lately trump has been ruining my trades with his tweets and sudden moves

So i made a tool to track his tweets , analysis news , tweets and risk 

It would give me 3-5 daily stock & crypto recommendations before the market opens

Giving free trials for testing and feedback 

https://trumpmarketindex.com/

comments.author: FxingMyLife
comments.body: Looks interesting - but you need to change your profit tracking - you aren't accounting for risk/position sizing. 1 Tesla share is a different proposition to 1 BTC. Adjust that in your metrics for how you show profit/loss.

replies.author: xxqxpxx
replies.body: Perfect insights. You are completely correct. I appreciate your feedback and will fix it
